content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

January 21, 2003

Kevin F. Kelley
Berliner Cohen
723 West 19th Street
Merced, CA 95340-4606

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No.: W-02-309

Dear Mr. Kelley:

Pursuant to our conversation and your subsequent letter of January 9, 2003, this correspondence confirms the withdrawal of your request for advice on City of Gustine Councilmember Mark Melville.

Under the provisions of regulation 18329(b)(8)(D), copy enclosed, your inquiry presents questions outside the purview of the Political Reform Act ("Act").1

Should you need assistance in the future regarding provisions of the Act, please do not hesitate to submit your request to the Fair Political Practices Commission via facsimile or U.S. Mail.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

Enclosure
JS:jg

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18996, of the California Code of Regulations.
